titles.title: Taishou Itsuwari Bridal: Migawari Hanayome to Gunpuku no Mouai
大正偽りブラヰダル 身代わり花嫁と軍服の猛愛
Taisho Era Contract Marriage: The Substitute Bride and a Soldier's Fierce Love

data.title: Taishou Itsuwari Bridal: Migawari Hanayome to Gunpuku no Mouai
data.title_english: Taisho Era Contract Marriage: The Substitute Bride and a Soldier's Fierce Love
data.title_japanese: 大正偽りブラヰダル 身代わり花嫁と軍服の猛愛
data.synopsis:
Asako, despite her status as a viscount's daughter, is shunned in high society. One day, a marriage proposal arrives for her younger sister with Captain Kido, a renowned soldier known for his ice-cold demeanor. Rumor says he seeks a bride solely for the purpose of bearing children... To protect her precious younger sister, Asako volunteers as a substitute bride.

(Source: TVDB)
data.background: The anime aired in two versions: a 15+ version on Tokyo MX and BS11, and an uncut 18+ version streamed on ComicFesta Anime Zone.

data.title: Youkoso Jitsuryoku Shijou Shugi no Kyoushitsu e 4th Season: 2-nensei-hen 1 Gakki
data.title_english: Classroom of the Elite 4th Season: Second Year, First Semester
data.title_japanese: ようこそ実力至上主義の教室へ 4th Season 2年生編1学期
title_synonyms: Welcome to the Classroom of the Elite
Classroom of the Elite IV: Year 2
data.synopsis:
As Ayanokouji and his classmates begin their second year at the Advanced Nurturing High School, they're greeted by a fresh gauntlet of exams and a fresh batch of rather unique first-year students. They'll have to get to know each other quickly, because the first special exam pairs the first-years with the second-years on a written test—with only the second-years facing expulsion if their team performs poorly! Worse yet? It seems one of the new first-years is also from the White Room. Can Ayanokouji avoid expulsion while sussing out the identity of this hidden foe?

(Source: Crunchyroll)

titles.title: Inazuma Eleven: Soushuuhen Densetsu no Kickoff
Inazuma Eleven Movie
Eiga Inazuma Eleven: Soushuuhen Densetsu no Kickoff
映画 イナズマイレブン総集編 伝説のキックオフ
Inazuma Eleven Movie: The Legendary Kickoff

data.title: Inazuma Eleven: Soushuuhen Densetsu no Kickoff
data.title_english: Inazuma Eleven Movie: The Legendary Kickoff
data.title_japanese: 映画 イナズマイレブン総集編 伝説のキックオフ
title_synonyms: Eiga Inazuma Eleven: Soushuuhen Densetsu no Kickoff
data.synopsis:
This is a compilation of the matches from Inazuma Eleven Football Frontier, the first game in the Inazuma Eleven series.
The Raimon Junior High soccer team, led by the protagonist Endou Mamoru, aims to win the national tournament, Football Frontier.
Thanks to the efforts of legendary striker Gouenji Shuya, who joins the team, they beat strong schools and make it through the regional qualifiers despite fierce battles. With their former rival, Teikoku Gakuen's genius game maker Kidou Arihito, now on board, Raimon Junior High School advances to the finals, but they are faced with the overwhelming strength of Zeus Junior High!

(Source: Official Website)

titles.title: Inazuma Eleven: Aratanaru Eiyuu-tachi no Joshou
Inazuma Eleven Movie

data.title: Inazuma Eleven: Aratanaru Eiyuu-tachi no Joshou
data.title_english: Inazuma Eleven the Movie: Prologue to the New Heroes
data.title_japanese: 劇場版 イナズマイレブン 新たなる英雄たちの序章
title_synonyms: Gekijouban Inazuma Eleven: Aratanaru Eiyuu-tachi no Joshou
data.synopsis:
The protagonist, Sasanami Unmei, transfers to Nagumohara Junior High School in Nagasaki in search of a soccer-free environment, wishing that soccer would disappear. Meanwhile, Endou Haru, who has demonstrated his natural talent and reigns at the top of his generation, also has complicated feelings about soccer. The unexpected encounter between these two opens the door to new heroes.

(Source: Official Website)

titles.title: Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu.
死亡遊戯で飯を食う。
Shiboyugi: Playing Death Games to Put Food on the Table

data.title: Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu.
data.title_english: Shiboyugi: Playing Death Games to Put Food on the Table
data.synopsis:
Yuuki wakes up to find herself in an unfamiliar manor, wearing a maid uniform and lying on a luxurious bed. Soon, she discovers five more girls, all dressed the same as her. This is the Ghost House, and the only way they can survive is to make it through the traps that lie in wait—deadly games full of blowguns, buzz saws, locked rooms, and weapons. It's a hopeless, terrifying situation for everyone there...well, everyone except Yuuki. After all, this is her career at seventeen. Do you think that's odd? She would agree. But that's how some people are—they earn their living playing death games.

(Source: Yen Press)

titles.title: Kidou Senshi Gundam: The Origin - Movie Edition
Mobile Suit Gundam: The Origin - Movie Edition
機動戦士ガンダム THE ORIGIN (movie edition)

data.title: Kidou Senshi Gundam: The Origin - Movie Edition
data.title_japanese: 機動戦士ガンダム THE ORIGIN (movie edition)
title_synonyms: Mobile Suit Gundam: The Origin - Movie Edition
data.synopsis:
In the year 0068 of the Universal Century, Casval Rem Deikun's life is thrown into chaotic disarray after the assassination of his father, a prolific figure in the crusade towards civil rights for people who live away from the Earth's surface. Casval and his sister Artesia receive aid from soldiers who were loyal to their father, and the siblings are whisked away from their home, separated, and thrown into a twisted fate that sees them come into their own as soldiers and adults.

Years before stealing the name Char Aznable or his "Red Comet" moniker, Casval must contend with the rise of a militarized version of his father's ideology and his own vengeful nature as intergalactic war molds him into a legendary mobile suit pilot. 

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Compilation films re-editing the original Kidou Senshi Gundam: The Origin OVA series into a movie trilogy format with no new added scenes or footage.

titles.title: A-Rank Party wo Ridatsu shita Ore wa, Moto Oshiego-tachi to Meikyuu Shinbu wo Mezasu.
Aparida
Aランクパーティを離脱した俺は、元教え子たちと迷宮深部を目指す。
I Left My A-Rank Party to Help My Former Students Reach the Dungeon Depths!

data.title: A-Rank Party wo Ridatsu shita Ore wa, Moto Oshiego-tachi to Meikyuu Shinbu wo Mezasu.
data.title_english: I Left My A-Rank Party to Help My Former Students Reach the Dungeon Depths!
data.title_japanese: Aランクパーティを離脱した俺は、元教え子たちと迷宮深部を目指す。
data.synopsis:
"I can't do this anymore!" Yuke Feldio, a red mage, just left his adventurer A-Rank party. After being mistreated as a handyman and ridiculed for five years, he finally snapped! And so began his desolate, unemployed life... or so he thought! Through a stroke of luck, Yuke is welcomed into an all-female adventurer party comprised of his former students!! As they defeat dungeons one after another, Yuke's true strength is gradually revealed! As it turns out, this red mage wields extraordinary magic and skills?!

(Source: Kodansha USA)
data.background: A-Rank Party wo Ridatsu shita Ore wa, Moto Oshiego-tachi to Meikyuu Shinbu wo Mezasu. was released on Blu-ray in three volumes from May 28, 2025, to September 24, 2025.

data.title: Pinkfong Wonder Star Teugbyeolpyeon: Hogiwa Dodugjadongcha
data.title_english: Pinkfong & Hogi Mini-Movie: The Tricky Three Cars
data.synopsis:
Magical cars have arrived in the peaceful town of Wonderville. Pinkfong and his friends enjoy the magic show, but Hogi is suspicious of the sudden arrival of the cars! What are they really up to? Hogi sets out on his own to save his friends from danger. Will he be able to save them all? Hogi's adventure to find his inner courage begins!

(Source: Pinkfong Wiki)
